ul.li: Offset 0x00: Hash (32 bytes). Node's unique identifier.
Offset 0x20-0x37: Left, Right, Parent pointers (8 bytes each).
Offset 0x38: Key (Go string header). Consists of a 64-bit pointer and 64-bit length.
Offset 0x40 (Boundary): The Key field crosses the first 64-byte cache line boundary.
Offset 0x50: Path (uint32). Bitwise path from root.
Offset 0x55: IsLeaf (bool). Dictates if Key/Version are valid.
Offset 0x56: Dirty (bool). Flag for persistence layer updates.
Offset 0x57: Padding (1 byte). Required to align next struct in an array to 8-byte boundary.
